text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sometime after the Yasuda Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is usually so bright and cheerful,
which is why I'm surprised to see how worried she
looks.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Well, um... I might just be overthinking things...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But my legs feel strange.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I've had a look at your test results. It's not exactly
an injury, but you do have some mild
inflammation in your legs.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
It's possible that the strain from your races and
training, combined with chronic stress, is starting
to take its toll.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What do you mean by "chronic stress"?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Well, you are extremely tall and carry more
weight than the average racer.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Your weight provides you with more explosive
power on the track. However, this also puts more
stress on areas that your muscles can't
compensate for, specifically your knees and
ankles.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Your naturally large frame has been a boon for
your racing career up until now. Unfortunately...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
It appears that your body is beginning to protest
against the strain it's been bearing.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
The way you utilize your physique on the track
has resulted in some very powerful and unique
races.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
But the more stress you place on your joints, the
more worn out they'll become.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: This could impact the rest of your racing career.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Take some time to think about my next step, huh? Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What should we do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I knew from the beginning that that weapon of
hers could eventually become a double-edged
sword.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Still, it's because of that weapon that she's she won many races. Those victories prove that we made the right choice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That fact that her joints are hurting means they're
under more strain than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's very career is hanging in the
balance. Making the wrong choice now could
change things irreversibly for the worse.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Start anew? How?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest she step away from racing for a while to
slim down, then come up with a new running style
that will be easier on her legs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono listens to me list off some ideas
without interrupting.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I, um...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to keep running the same way I have been.
Everybody is waiting for me, and running is so
much fun.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But... I understand.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You're telling me about this tough choice because
it'll help me in the end.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Can I have a little time to think about this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's eyes drift to a poster of the
now-concluded Yasuda Kinen that hasn't been
taken down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The large poster depicts her and Taiki Shuttle
standing off against each other and served to
hype up their clash.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
What to make? I guess I can get some water
boiling for now...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hmm. A new body for a new me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Today, all eyes are once again on Hishi Akebono,
who has dropped quite a few levels in weight
class!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
While her running doesn't carry the same powerful
impact as before, her strides look airy and light!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's steadily overtaken the others and has seized
the lead!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess I can't keep this up forever. I might
even be able to get stronger if we change tactics.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That's Hishi Akebono?! She's towering over the others!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Incredible, right? I can't wait for the race to start!
She'll be a sight to see!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she's huge! And the force and speed she ran
with was terrifying!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I really like seeing and hearing everyone's surprise
at how big I am, and I like it when they cheer for
me too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"Bono was absolutely towering and Biko looked
so petite, but the way they both ran their hearts
out really moved me!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Everyone left so many nice comments, and
they're all rooting for me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten so many more fans, and they say nice
thing about how powerful my races are too...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Watching Hishi Akebono and Taiki Shuttle race
was like watching a true clash between titans!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It's fun watching the others run, but there's just
something special about Bono. That intensity of
hers is second to none!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Just watching her makes me feel so much more
energized!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I like the way I am now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But... if I can't run anymore, I won't be able to
race for them at all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What should I do? What should I pick?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I think I'll make some porridge for today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after discussing the future with Hishi
Akebono...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, remember how you said you wanted me
to take a long break from racing?
choice_data_list: Have you decided what you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... Actually, I was wondering if you could
wait a little longer before I give you my answer.
Maybe for another three...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Three months.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to see everybody's reactions at the
Sprinters S. before I decide what to do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing I can do but agree to wait since I
can't force her into a new training regime if she
isn't completely on board.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep a close eye on her condition and draw up a
routine that's easier on her knees and joints while
waiting for her to make the final call.
